text: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Five Chinese COSCO tankers scheduled to transit the Strait of Hormuz this week are now stuck and will not proceed until the situation clears up
text_zh: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 原定于本周通过霍尔木兹海峡的五艘中国中远海运油轮目前受阻，在局势明朗之前不会继续航行

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s deputy parliament speaker, Ali Nikzad, said the goal of the United States in the Isfahan operation was to seize uranium, but they failed. He stated that Iran was ready to demonstrate goodwill by diluting 450 kilograms of enriched uranium – not handing it over. In previous negotiations, a consortium for uranium dilution with US and Saudi participation was planned, but they backed out. He also noted that the U.S. proposed establishing a legal framework for the Strait of Hormuz that would include Americans, adding: “What do they have to do with the strait?” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会副议长阿里·尼克扎德（Ali Nikzad）表示，美国在伊斯法罕行动中的目标是夺取铀，但他们失败了。他指出，伊朗已准备好通过稀释450公斤浓缩铀来展示善意，而不是将其移交。在之前的谈判中，曾计划建立一个有美国和沙特参与的铀稀释财团，但他们退出了。他还提到，美国提议为霍尔木兹海峡建立一个包括美国人在内的法律框架，并补充道：“这与他们有什么关系？” @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: The ceasefire with Iran could end quickly.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：与伊朗的停火协议可能很快就会结束。

text: EU's von der Leyen: Moving to qualified majority voting in foreign policy is an important way to avoid systematic blockages as we've seen in the past. We should use the momentum now really to move forward on that topic.
text_zh: 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩：在外交政策中转向特定多数表决制是避免像过去那样出现系统性阻碍的重要途径。我们现在应该利用这一势头，真正推动该议题的进展。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli military lawyer Idan Dvir has been indicted for sexually exploiting at least ten female soldiers and pre‑recruits whom he represented. According to the indictment, he offered to waive legal fees of between 2,000 and 10,000 shekels in exchange for sexual acts, and in some cases sent a price list detailing the value of each act. In one instance, he asked a soldier: “If I release you today, do I deserve compensation?” He also allegedly drove a client to his home and forced sexual acts on her. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列军事律师伊丹·德维尔（Idan Dvir）因性剥削至少十名他所代理的女兵和预备役人员而被起诉。根据起诉书，他以减免2000至10000谢克尔的律师费为交换条件要求性行为，在某些情况下甚至发送了一份详细说明每项行为价值的价目表。有一次，他问一名士兵：“如果我今天释放你，我是否应该得到补偿？”他还被指控将一名客户带回家并强迫其发生性行为。 @wfwitness

text: 🇻🇦 🇺🇸 "I have no fear of the Trump administration or speaking out loudly of the message of the Gospel, which is what I believe I am here to do, what the Church is here to do." - Pope Leo XIV 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇻🇦 🇺🇸 “我不惧怕特朗普政府，也不惧怕大声宣扬福音的信息，我相信这就是我来此的目的，也是教会存在的目的。” - 教皇利奥十四世 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji said that the goal of direct negotiations with Israel is to achieve a ceasefire. He confirmed that Lebanon has effectively separated its file from the Iranian track, and that the state alone holds the decision…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 A senior Hezbollah official, Nawaf al‑Mousawi, said that the group’s agenda for any negotiations with Israel is the liberation of Lebanese land. “Israel will not move from a single grain of soil unless pushed by force,” he stated, adding that Israel will only release Lebanese prisoners through force. Al‑Mousawi emphasised that Hezbollah has deep experience with Israel and knows how it negotiates every comma and period, and therefore Hezbollah’s agenda is different. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉（Youssef Rajji）表示，与以色列直接谈判的目标是实现停火。他证实，黎巴嫩已有效地将其档案与伊朗轨道分离开来，且只有国家本身拥有决策权……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 真主党高级官员纳瓦夫·穆萨维（Nawaf al-Mousawi）表示，该组织与以色列进行任何谈判的议程都是解放黎巴嫩领土。“除非受到武力推动，否则以色列不会从一粒土地上撤出，”他表示，并补充说以色列只有通过武力才会释放黎巴嫩囚犯。穆萨维强调，真主党对以色列有深刻的了解，知道它如何就每一个逗号和句号进行谈判，因此真主党的议程是不同的。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said he spoke with U.S. Vice President JD Vance, who reported that talks collapsed because Iran violated the agreement to open the Strait of Hormuz after a ceasefire. The U.S. central demand is the removal…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli army radio noted a significant nuance in Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu’s remarks: The US demand is for no uranium enrichment in Iran “in the coming years, and that could be decades” – not a permanent ban. This suggests a sunset clause similar to the 2015 JCPOA, which limited enrichment for 10 years. Trump withdrew from that agreement in 2018 precisely because it allowed Iran to resume advanced enrichment after a set period. The report questions whether the Trump administration is now advancing a deal that includes the same problematic sunset provision. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇮🇷 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他与美国副总统万斯进行了交谈，万斯报告称谈判破裂，因为伊朗在停火后违反了开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议。美国的核心要求是移除……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列陆军电台指出了内塔尼亚胡总理言论中的一个重要细微差别：美国的要求是伊朗“在未来几年，甚至可能是几十年内”不得进行铀浓缩，而不是永久禁止。这暗示了一个类似于2015年《伊核协议》（JCPOA）的日落条款，该协议限制了10年的浓缩活动。特朗普在2018年退出该协议，正是因为它允许伊朗在一段时期后恢复先进的浓缩活动。该报道质疑特朗普政府现在是否正在推进一项包含同样有问题的日落条款的协议。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: Yesterday, I spoke with Vice President JD Vance, who called me from his plane while returning from a trip. He briefed me in detail, as this administration does daily, on the developments in the negotiations. He conveyed to me that the central issue for President Trump and the United States is the removal of all enriched material and ensuring that there will be no enrichment in Iran for years to come, possibly decades. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡：昨天，我与万斯副总统进行了交谈，他在结束行程返回的飞机上给我打了电话。正如本届政府每天所做的那样，他向我详细通报了谈判的进展。他向我传达了特朗普总统和美国的核心议题是移除所有浓缩材料，并确保伊朗在未来几年，甚至可能是几十年内不再进行浓缩。推文

text: EU's von der Leyen on Hungary: The people of Hungary have spoken, and they have reclaimed their European path. Our union is stronger and more united; it was an exceptional evening yesterday.
text_zh: 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩谈匈牙利：匈牙利人民已经发声，他们已经夺回了自己的欧洲道路。我们的联盟更加强大、更加团结；昨天是一个非凡的夜晚。

text: The Spectator Index Netanyahu says ceasefire with Iran could end soon. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数 内塔尼亚胡称与伊朗的停火协议可能很快结束。推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: Since Iran violated the rules, Trump decided to impose a blockade, a naval siege, and we of course support this firm position. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652564898488334/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡：由于伊朗违反了规则，特朗普决定实施封锁，即海军围困，我们当然支持这一坚定立场。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652564898488334/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: 'The ceasefire is like a coin - it can flip very quickly' https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652371113251097/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡：“停火就像一枚硬币——它可以很快翻转” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652371113251097/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel PM Netanyahu: We have alignment with the most powerful nation in the world, and together we have the capability to confront the gravest threats. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652247171531023/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡总理：我们与世界上最强大的国家保持一致，我们共同有能力应对最严重的威胁。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043652247171531023/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: Israel is at the height of its power https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043651899870650763/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡：以色列正处于其实力的巅峰 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043651899870650763/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Bloomberg, citing a Cypriot official, the EU is looking to push through a €90 billion loan for Ukraine now that Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban‘a government is on the way out. Prime Minister Orbán previously blocked the loan and the incoming prime minister, Peter Magyar is expected to allow the loan to be pushed through. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据彭博社援引一位塞浦路斯官员的话称，随着匈牙利总理欧尔班·维克托的政府即将下台，欧盟正寻求推动向乌克兰提供900亿欧元的贷款。欧尔班总理此前曾阻止该贷款，预计即将上任的总理彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）将允许该贷款获得通过。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Ursula von der Leyen reacts to Hungary's election results: "It is a victory for fundamental freedoms" and says EU should look at the lessons learned like moving "to qualified majority voting in foreign policy... to avoid systemic blockages as we've seen in the past." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043650219619827941/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 乌苏拉·冯德莱恩对匈牙利选举结果作出反应：“这是基本自由的胜利”，并表示欧盟应该吸取教训，例如转向“外交政策中的特定多数表决制……以避免像过去那样出现系统性阻碍。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043650219619827941/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu at today's cabinet meeting: "I spoke yesterday with Vice President J.D. Vance. He called me from his plane back from Islamabad. He reported to me in detail, as the people of this administration do every day, about the development of the negotiations. In this case, the breakdown in negotiations. The breakdown came from the American side, which could not tolerate Iran's blatant violation of the agreement to enter negotiations. The agreement was that they stop firing, and the Iranians immediately open the straits. They didn't do it. The Americans could not accept it. He also made clear to me that the main issue on the agenda for President Trump and the United States is the removal of all enriched material, and to ensure there is no more enrichment in the coming years, and it could be decades, no enrichment inside Iran. That is their focus. Of course it is also important to us." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡在今天的内阁会议上表示：“我昨天与万斯副总统进行了交谈。他在从伊斯兰堡返回的飞机上给我打了电话。正如本届政府的人员每天所做的那样，他向我详细报告了谈判的进展。在这种情况下，是谈判的破裂。破裂来自美方，美方无法容忍伊朗公然违反进入谈判的协议。协议是他们停止射击，伊朗人立即开放海峡。他们没有这样做。美国人无法接受。他还向我明确表示，特朗普总统和美国议程上的主要议题是移除所有浓缩材料，并确保在未来几年，甚至可能是几十年内，伊朗境内不再有浓缩活动。这是他们的重点。当然，这对我们也很重要。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Rep. Anna Paulina Luna is preparing to bring a motion to expel Rep. Eric Swalwell from Congress, with some Democrats reportedly willing to support it. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043648497593745617/video/1 Over 50 former staffers of U.S. Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-CA) are calling for his immediate resignation and exit from the race for California governor. “The (sexual assault) allegations reported by the San Francisco Chronicle and CNN are serious, credible, and demand responsibility.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 安娜·保利娜·卢纳（Anna Paulina Luna）众议员正准备提出一项动议，将埃里克·斯沃韦尔（Eric Swalwell）众议员驱逐出国会，据报道一些民主党人愿意支持该动议。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043648497593745617/video/1 超过50名前美国众议员埃里克·斯沃韦尔（加利福尼亚州民主党）的工作人员呼吁他立即辞职并退出加州州长竞选。“《旧金山纪事报》和CNN报道的（性侵犯）指控是严重的、可信的，需要承担责任。” - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: Israel seeks a deeper security zone in Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡：以色列寻求在黎巴嫩建立一个更深的安全区。推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu at cabinet meeting: "We support President Trump's aggressive stance to impose a naval blockade on Iran." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043647766342053968/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡在内阁会议上表示：“我们支持特朗普总统对伊朗实施海军封锁的强硬立场。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043647766342053968/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel UNIFIL says an Israeli tank rammed UN peacekeeper vehicles in southern Lebanon. The IDF said the convoy had entered an active combat zone without coordination and described the incident as minor contact. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（UNIFIL）称，一辆以色列坦克在黎巴嫩南部撞击了联合国维和部队的车辆。以色列国防军表示，该车队未经协调进入了活跃的战斗区，并将此事件描述为轻微接触。推文

text: The Spectator Index Netanyahu says that Israel supports US blockade of Iranian ports. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数 内塔尼亚胡称以色列支持美国对伊朗港口的封锁。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's judiciary chief Mohseni Ejei: Cases involving suspected spies and "collaborators with the enemy" are now being handled under wartime rules, not standard legal procedures, "until further notice." "Our situation is fully combat and in line with the requirements of the war stage." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗司法部长莫森尼·埃杰伊（Mohseni Ejei）：涉及涉嫌间谍和“与敌人合作者”的案件现在将根据战时规则处理，而不是标准的法律程序，“直至另行通知”。“我们的局势完全是战斗状态，符合战争阶段的要求。” 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Ursula von der Leyen says that the Middle East crisis has made clear, "the only lasting way out of the fossil dependency is to modernize" by shifting to green energy and "electrifying the economy as rapidly as possible." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043646232564801742/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 乌苏拉·冯德莱恩表示，中东危机已经明确，“摆脱化石能源依赖的唯一持久途径是现代化”，即转向绿色能源并“尽可能快地实现经济电气化”。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043646232564801742/video/1 推文

text: EU's von der Leyen: We need to scale up the homegrown, affordable, reliable energy—this is the wide range of different renewables we have, but it is also the nuclear.
text_zh: 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩：我们需要扩大本土、负担得起且可靠的能源——这是我们拥有的各种可再生能源，但也包括核能。

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Zionist media reported that a Hezbollah missile struck the settlement of Karmiel.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 犹太复国主义媒体报道称，一枚真主党导弹击中了卡尔米尔（Karmiel）定居点。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 Negotiations between Israel and Lebanon are set to open on Tuesday in Washington at the ambassadorial level. Lebanese Culture Minister Ghassan Salamé said the meeting is not for negotiations but for “discussions or talks of a logistical nature."…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji said that the goal of direct negotiations with Israel is to achieve a ceasefire. He confirmed that Lebanon has effectively separated its file from the Iranian track, and that the state alone holds the decision to negotiate. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 以色列与黎巴嫩之间的谈判定于周二在华盛顿举行大使级会谈。黎巴嫩文化部长加桑·萨拉梅（Ghassan Salamé）表示，此次会议并非为了谈判，而是为了‘进行后勤性质的讨论或谈话’……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉（Youssef Rajji）表示，与以色列直接谈判的目标是实现停火。他证实，黎巴嫩已有效地将其档案与伊朗轨道分离开来，且只有国家本身拥有谈判的决策权。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区及周边地区拉响了红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu compares nuclear facilities to extermination camps: If we had not acted, then places like Natanz, Fordow, and Bushehr would be remembered like Auschwitz, Majdanek, and Sobibor.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡将核设施比作灭绝营：如果我们没有采取行动，那么纳坦兹、福尔多和布什尔等地就会像奥斯威辛、马伊达内克和索比堡一样被铭记。

text: Netanyahu: Israel is at the height of its power.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：以色列正处于其实力的巅峰。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 Indonesia says it is in talks with the United States over a potential agreement to grant U.S. military aircraft access to its airspace, though no deal has been finalized. U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is expected to meet Indonesian Defense Minister…" ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 Indonesia’s Ministry of Defence has said that no final approval has been given for U.S. military aircraft to access its airspace. A blanket overflight clearance document has not been finalised and has no legal binding power, a ministry spokesman said. The proposal remains under internal and inter‑agency review. “The authority, control, and supervision of Indonesian airspace remains fully in the hands of Indonesia,” he added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 印度尼西亚表示正在与美国就一项潜在协议进行谈判，允许美国军用飞机进入其领空，尽管尚未达成最终协议。预计美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）将与印尼国防部长会面……” ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 印尼国防部表示，尚未批准美国军用飞机进入其领空。国防部发言人称，全面飞越许可文件尚未最终确定，且不具备法律约束力。该提案仍在内部和跨部门审查中。“印尼领空的权威、控制和监督权完全掌握在印尼手中，”他补充道。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: We have alignment with the most powerful nation in the world, and together we have the capability to confront the gravest threats.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：我们与世界上最强大的国家保持一致，我们共同有能力应对最严重的威胁。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇬🇧🇹🇷🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron said France and the UK will convene a conference with other countries willing to contribute to a peaceful multinational mission to restore freedom of navigation through the Strait of Hormuz. The initiative will…" ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will likely negatively impact global markets. “Many details remain unclear and incomprehensible, so I would refrain from making any substantive comments at this time,” he told reporters. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷🇬🇧🇹🇷🇮🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙表示，法国和英国将与其他愿意为恢复霍尔木兹海峡航行自由的和平多国特派团做出贡献的国家召开会议。该倡议将……” ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 克里姆林宫发言人德米特里·佩斯科夫表示，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁可能会对全球市场产生负面影响。“许多细节仍然不清楚且难以理解，所以我目前不会发表任何实质性评论，”他告诉记者。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: Since Iran violated the rules, Trump decided to impose a blockade, a naval siege, and we of course support this firm position.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：由于伊朗违反了规则，特朗普决定实施封锁，即海军围困，我们当然支持这一坚定立场。

text: Netanyahu: Yesterday, I spoke with Vice President JD Vance, who called me from his plane while returning from a trip. He briefed me in detail, as this administration does daily, on the developments in the negotiations. He conveyed to me that the central issue for President Trump and the United States is the removal of all enriched material and ensuring that there will be no enrichment in Iran for years to come, possibly decades.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：昨天，我与万斯副总统进行了交谈，他在结束行程返回的飞机上给我打了电话。正如本届政府每天所做的那样，他向我详细通报了谈判的进展。他向我传达了特朗普总统和美国的核心议题是移除所有浓缩材料，并确保伊朗在未来几年，甚至可能是几十年内不再进行浓缩。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said he spoke with U.S. Vice President JD Vance, who reported that talks collapsed because Iran violated the agreement to open the Strait of Hormuz after a ceasefire. The U.S. central demand is the removal of all enriched uranium from Iran and an end to future enrichment. Netanyahu expressed support for U.S. President Trump’s decision to impose a naval blockade on Iran, describing US‑Israel coordination as unprecedented. Visiting Israeli forces in Lebanon’s security zone, Netanyahu said fighting continues, now focused on Bint Jbeil. Without Israel’s strength, he warned, Iran’s nuclear sites would be remembered like Auschwitz. “They came to destroy us – now they fight for their survival.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他与美国副总统万斯进行了交谈，万斯报告称谈判破裂，因为伊朗在停火后违反了开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议。美国的核心要求是移除伊朗所有的浓缩铀并结束未来的浓缩活动。内塔尼亚胡对特朗普总统决定对伊朗实施海军封锁表示支持，称美以协调是前所未有的。在访问黎巴嫩安全区的以色列军队时，内塔尼亚胡表示战斗仍在继续，目前集中在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）。他警告说，如果没有以色列的力量，伊朗的核设施就会像奥斯威辛一样被铭记。“他们来摧毁我们——现在他们为生存而战。” @wfwitness

text: South Korean President Compares Israeli Killings to Nazi Holocaust, Sparking Debate South Korean President Lee Jae Myung sparked a diplomatic row with Israel on Friday, after comparing IDF wartime killings to the Nazi Holocaust on X, drawing Israeli condemnation & social media exchanges between politicians. READ MORE
text_zh: 韩国总统将以色列的杀戮比作纳粹大屠杀，引发争议 韩国总统李在明周五在X上将以色列国防军的战时杀戮与纳粹大屠杀进行比较，引发了与以色列的外交争端，招致了以色列的谴责以及政客们在社交媒体上的交锋。阅读更多

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike on Shaaitiyeh,Tyre. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列对提尔（Tyre）的沙伊蒂耶（Shaaitiyeh）进行了空袭。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 United Nations peacekeepers in Lebanon said an Israeli battle tank rammed their vehicles, warning shots struck clearly identifiable UN vehicles, and soldiers blocked movements and destroyed cameras. The IDF responded that a UNIFIL convoy arrived without coordination in an active combat zone, and that a minor collision occurred between one convoy vehicle and an IDF vehicle as troops allowed it to pass. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 联合国驻黎巴嫩维和部队表示，一辆以色列主战坦克撞击了他们的车辆，警告射击击中了清晰可辨的联合国车辆，士兵们阻碍了行动并摧毁了摄像机。以色列国防军回应称，联黎部队车队未经协调进入了活跃的战斗区，并且在部队允许其通过时，车队车辆与以色列国防军车辆发生了轻微碰撞。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Iran-linked hacking group Handala says it is targeting Saudi industrial infrastructure with cyberattacks. - Fars tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 与伊朗有关的黑客组织Handala称其正在通过网络攻击针对沙特的工业基础设施。 - 法尔斯通讯社 推文

text: WarTranslated Peskov stated that they respect the choice of the Hungarian people. "We expect that we will continue our very pragmatic contacts with the new leadership of Hungary. We have heard the statements, especially regarding the readiness to engage in dialogue." - Putin's spokesperson declared. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 佩斯科夫表示，他们尊重匈牙利人民的选择。“我们预计我们将继续与匈牙利新领导层进行非常务实的接触。我们已经听到了相关声明，特别是关于进行对话的意愿。” - 普京发言人宣布。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇹🇷🇮🇷 Turkey’s Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said the Strait of Hormuz should reopen through “peaceful means” and warned that any military approach to securing the waterway would be “very complicated”. He added that “no country wants to be part of the war…" ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron said France and the UK will convene a conference with other countries willing to contribute to a peaceful multinational mission to restore freedom of navigation through the Strait of Hormuz. The initiative will involve a strictly defensive mission, separate from the warring parties, to be deployed as soon as conditions allow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇹🇷🇮🇷 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹（Hakan Fidan）表示，霍尔木兹海峡应通过‘和平手段’重新开放，并警告称任何确保水道安全的军事手段都将‘非常复杂’。他补充说，‘没有国家想参与针对伊朗的战争……’” ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙表示，法国和英国将与其他愿意为恢复霍尔木兹海峡航行自由的和平多国特派团做出贡献的国家召开会议。该倡议将涉及一项严格的防御性任务，与交战方分开，并在条件允许时尽快部署。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 Turkey’s Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said the Strait of Hormuz should reopen through “peaceful means” and warned that any military approach to securing the waterway would be “very complicated”. He added that “no country wants to be part of the war waged against Iran” and urged diplomatic solutions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹（Hakan Fidan）表示，霍尔木兹海峡应通过“和平手段”重新开放，并警告称任何确保水道安全的军事手段都将“非常复杂”。他补充说，“没有国家想参与针对伊朗的战争”，并敦促采取外交解决方案。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区及周边地区拉响了无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Iranian Embassy in Thailand wins the shit posting game. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 伊朗驻泰国大使馆赢得了垃圾帖比赛。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Yemen’s Ansar Allah resistance movement warned that it will intensify its military operations if the US and Israeli regime resume aggression against Iran
text_zh: 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 也门安萨尔真主党抵抗运动警告称，如果美国和以色列政权恢复对伊朗的侵略，他们将加强军事行动

text: Amnesty Demands Probe on Nigeria Market Bombing Misfire that Killed Over 100 People Nigerian Air Force jets struck a crowded weekly market in Yobe state on Saturday, killing over 100 civilians including children. Amnesty International & local community leaders demanded an independent probe as the military cited successful operations against insurgencies. READ MORE
text_zh: 大赦国际要求调查尼日利亚市场爆炸误炸事件，造成100多人死亡 尼日利亚空军喷气式飞机周六袭击了约贝州一个拥挤的每周市场，造成包括儿童在内的100多名平民死亡。大赦国际和当地社区领袖要求进行独立调查，而军方则称这是针对叛乱活动的成功行动。阅读更多

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区拉响了无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The Kremlin says that Russia is ready to take in Iran’s enriched uranium as part of a future peace deal with the United States. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 克里姆林宫表示，作为与美国未来和平协议的一部分，俄罗斯准备接收伊朗的浓缩铀。 @wfwitness
